description: Prove that list append is associative: xs ++ (ys ++ zs) = (xs ++ ys) ++ zs.
statement:
theorem append_assoc_manual (xs ys zs : List α) :
    xs ++ (ys ++ zs) = (xs ++ ys) ++ zs
notes: From fp-lean/examples/Examples/Induction.lean lines 305-306. Renamed to append_assoc' to avoid conflict with Mathlib's List.append_assoc.
